label: Automotive & Vehicles
description: Industry archetype for automotive parts, accessories, vehicles, and aftermarket components. Includes product types for OEM parts, aftermarket accessories, tires, and fluids with technical attributes for vehicle fitment, engine specifications, OE numbers, and regulatory compliance (ECE, DOT, SAE).

attribute_groups.description: Vehicle compatibility: make, model, year, engine, and trim level for part fitment
Engine specifications, displacement, fuel type, transmission, and drivetrain attributes
OE part numbers, cross-references, manufacturer codes, and interchange data
Performance ratings, load capacity, safety certifications, and compliance marks
Dimensions, weight, material composition, and finish for automotive parts

attribute_types.validation_message: Enter a year (2020) or year range (2018-2024)
Part numbers may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and dots

attributes.options: Audi, BMW, Chevrolet, Chrysler, Citroën, Dodge, Fiat, Ford, Honda, Hyundai, Jaguar, Jeep, Kia, Land Rover, Lexus, Mazda, Mercedes-Benz, Mini, Mitsubishi, Nissan, Opel, Peugeot, Porsche, Renault, Seat, Škoda, Subaru, Suzuki, Tesla, Toyota, Volkswagen, Volvo, Universal
attributes.description: Vehicle manufacturer the part is designed for (select Universal for multi-fit)
Vehicle model name or comma-separated list of compatible models
Compatible model years as a range (e.g., 2018-2024)

attributes.options: Petrol, Diesel, Hybrid, Plug-in Hybrid, Electric, LPG, CNG, Hydrogen
attributes.description: Fuel or powertrain type the part is compatible with
Engine displacement in litres or cc (e.g., 2.0L, 1998cc)

attributes.options: Manual, Automatic, CVT, DCT, AMT, N/A
attributes.description: Transmission type the part fits (N/A if not transmission-specific)
Drivetrain configuration the part is designed for
Original Equipment part number from the vehicle manufacturer
Equivalent part numbers from other manufacturers (comma-separated)

attributes.options: Front, Rear, Left, Right, Front Left, Front Right, Rear Left, Rear Right, Upper, Lower, Inner, Outer, N/A
attributes.description: Installation position on the vehicle (for side-specific or directional parts)

attributes.options: New, Remanufactured, Used - Grade A, Used - Grade B, Core
attributes.description: Condition of the part: new, remanufactured, or used with grading

attributes.options: Steel, Aluminium, Cast Iron, Stainless Steel, Carbon Fibre, Plastic, Rubber, Ceramic, Copper, Brass, Composite
attributes.description: Primary material the part is manufactured from
Weight of the part in kilograms for shipping and handling

attributes.options: Chrome, Matte Black, Gloss Black, Silver, Painted, Powder Coated, Anodised, Raw, Galvanised
attributes.description: Surface finish or coating applied to the part

attributes.options: ECE R90, DOT, SAE, TÜV, ISO 9001, IATF 16949, ADR, E-Mark, None
attributes.description: Regulatory certification or safety standard the part complies with
Maximum load rating or capacity (e.g., 92T for tyres, 1500 kg for springs)

attributes.options: 6 Months, 1 Year, 2 Years, 3 Years, 5 Years, Lifetime, As-Is
attributes.description: Manufacturer or seller warranty coverage period
Oil or fluid viscosity grade (SAE classification)

product_types.description: Original Equipment Manufacturer parts sourced directly from vehicle manufacturers or authorised suppliers. Identified by OE part numbers.
Third-party replacement parts compatible with one or more vehicle makes and models. May offer enhanced performance or value.
Upgraded or high-performance parts designed to improve vehicle output, handling, or braking beyond OEM specifications.
Tyres for passenger vehicles, SUVs, and light trucks. Classified by size, speed rating, load index, and season.
Oils, lubricants, coolants, brake fluids, and chemical treatments. Classified by viscosity, specification, and capacity.
Vehicle accessories including floor mats, roof racks, lighting upgrades, and interior enhancements.

product_families.description: Root family for all automotive parts, accessories, and fluids
Engine components: gaskets, filters, belts, pumps, sensors, and ignition parts
Engine air filters and cabin air filters
Engine oil filters and transmission filters
Spark plugs, ignition coils, and glow plugs
Brake pads, discs, callipers, lines, and master cylinders
Front and rear brake pads in organic, semi-metallic, and ceramic compounds
Solid and ventilated brake discs (rotors)
Shock absorbers, struts, springs, control arms, and steering components
Gas and oil shock absorbers and strut assemblies
Coil springs, leaf springs, and lowering springs
Tyres, alloy wheels, steel wheels, and wheel accessories
Summer and all-season tyres for warm and dry conditions
Winter tyres with M+S and 3PMSF markings
Cast and forged alloy wheels in various sizes and finishes
Engine oils, transmission fluids, brake fluids, coolants, and additives
Fully synthetic, semi-synthetic, and mineral engine oils
DOT 3, DOT 4, and DOT 5.1 brake fluids
Vehicle accessories: floor mats, roof racks, lighting, and interior upgrades
Rubber, carpet, and all-weather floor mats
LED bulbs, headlight assemblies, fog lights, and light bars

Engine and transmission oil filters
Spark plugs, ignition coils, and glow plugs

Organic, semi-metallic, and ceramic brake pads
Solid and ventilated brake discs
Brake callipers and calliper repair kits
Shock absorbers, springs, control arms, and steering parts
Gas and oil shock absorbers for all vehicle types
Coil springs, leaf springs, and lowering kits
Control arms, wishbones, bushings, and ball joints
Tyres, alloy wheels, and wheel accessories
Summer and all-season tyres
Winter and studded tyres
Aftermarket and OEM alloy wheels
Engine oils, brake fluids, coolants, and additives
Synthetic, semi-synthetic, and mineral engine oils
Brake fluid and power steering fluid
Engine coolant and antifreeze concentrates
Vehicle accessories and interior enhancements
All-weather and carpet floor mats
LED bulbs, headlight upgrades, and auxiliary lighting
Newly listed automotive parts and accessories
Discounted and clearance automotive products

quality_rules.message: Automotive parts must specify the compatible vehicle make
quality_rules.description: Vehicle make is the primary fitment criterion for parts lookup and compatibility

quality_rules.message: Parts must specify compatible vehicle model(s)
quality_rules.description: Vehicle model is essential for accurate fitment and prevents incorrect purchases

quality_rules.message: Parts must specify compatible model year(s)
quality_rules.description: Model year range ensures customers find parts that fit their specific vehicle generation

quality_rules.message: Providing an OE part number improves searchability and cross-referencing
quality_rules.description: OE numbers are the industry standard for identifying and cross-referencing parts

quality_rules.message: Part condition (New, Remanufactured, Used) must be specified
quality_rules.description: Condition disclosure is legally required in most markets for automotive parts

quality_rules.message: Safety-critical parts should specify regulatory certification (ECE, DOT, etc.)
quality_rules.description: Certification information builds trust and is required for braking and lighting parts

quality_rules.message: Specifying warranty period helps build customer confidence
quality_rules.description: Warranty coverage is a key differentiator in aftermarket automotive parts

quality_rules.message: Automotive parts should have at least 2 images (product photo, fitment/mounting detail)
quality_rules.description: Product and fitment images help customers verify compatibility before purchase

quality_rules.message: Part weight must be a positive number
quality_rules.description: Zero or negative weight values indicate data entry errors

demo_products.product_name: Front Brake Pad Set - BMW 3 Series
demo_products.description: Premium ceramic front brake pad set for BMW 3 Series (F30/F31/G20). ECE R90 approved with low dust formula and chamfered edges for noise reduction.
Fully synthetic 5W-30 engine oil meeting ACEA C3 and BMW LL-04 specifications. Excellent cold-start protection and fuel economy.
Sport-tuned gas shock absorber for VW Golf Mk7/Mk8. Offers 20% firmer damping for improved handling while maintaining ride comfort.
Premium all-season tyre with asymmetric tread pattern. Excellent wet grip and low rolling resistance for fuel efficiency.

demo_products.product_name: Custom-Fit Floor Mat Set - Mercedes C-Class
demo_products.description: Precision-cut all-weather rubber floor mats for Mercedes C-Class (W206). Anti-slip backing and raised edges for maximum protection.
